description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton with branding appliqué, embroidery and graphic print on the front with stitch linesFitRegularWash careMachine wash inside out with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or flat dry in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationsIndulge in the fantasy of leaving civilisation far behind and riding to far off places. This black tee from wrangler is meant for the riding enthusiast. The short sleeves sit snug on well-toned arms, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and sports shoes or cotton shorts and leather sandals for unparalleled cool.Model StatisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
